form.formComment: Well supported last time and rocketed out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but had to settle for the minor money, finishing a 1.5 lengths third (26.04) over 460m at Warragul. Although beaten ran one of the quickest times on the card last time. Follow up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Well supported last time and rocketed out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but had to settle for the minor money, finishing a 1.5 lengths third (26.04) over 460m at Warragul. Although beaten ran one of the quickest times on the card last time. Follow up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked on first turn and lost ground in back straight.

form.formComment: Strong performance showing plenty of speed to score by 2 lengths in a Grade 4/5 last start at Horsham, recording a superb 27.18 over the 485m journey. In form and rates on top again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance showing plenty of speed to score by 2 lengths in a Grade 4/5 last start at Horsham, recording a superb 27.18 over the 485m journey. In form and rates on top again.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Horsham over 485m. Last start finished 5th in a Grade 4/5 on March 31 over 485m at Horsham behind Doongalla Rocket beaten 4 lengths (27.45). Well placed and among the chances here.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: In the money last time at Angle Park (30.41) in a OPEN, finishing a 3 length third. Goes very well from the draw boasting seven places from eight starts. Tough field and looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In the money last time at Angle Park (30.41) in a OPEN, finishing a 3 length third. Goes very well from the draw boasting seven places from eight starts. Tough field and looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Had a winning run broken last start when third over 525m at The Meadows. Thereabouts last time others preferred this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Had a winning run broken last start when third over 525m at The Meadows. Thereabouts last time others preferred this line-up.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Wentworth Park (29.71) in a NG, finishing a 5.5 lengths fifth. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Having his first start over this trip. Last start finished third at Ballarat over 390m in (22.43). With some luck and a clean start should figure in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Having his first start over this trip. Last start finished third at Ballarat over 390m in (22.43). With some luck and a clean start should figure in the finish.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at The Meadows over 525m in 30.14. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 525m at The Meadows at Free For All level. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

formComments.comment: Won two starts back at The Meadows over 525m in 30.14. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 525m at The Meadows at Free For All level. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

form.formComment: Strong performance leading throughout to post a big 5.5 lengths victory in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking an excellent 22.38 for the 400m trip. Harder here but worth including in multiples.
